versions.label: v9.1.4 — Plugin Trifecta + Hook Health + Action Infra
versions.summary: Three new plugins (Builder, Composio, Open Design), HookHealthMonitor with persistent action run tracking, govern LiveView polish, story-refs API, and sidebar SSOT correction.
features: Builder Plugin: interactive 5-step wizard for scaffolding new CCEM plugins from existing repos (GitHub URL, local path, .git path)
Composio Plugin: MCP server registry, tool store, account store, webhook handler integration
Open Design Plugin: design-handoff client, monitor, and JSX to LiveComponent ingestion
HookHealthMonitor: cross-project hook filesystem health scanning with async ETS-backed health state
ActionRunStore: persistent action execution run history with replay support
Govern LiveView polish: approvals/alignment/coalesce/dashboard/intake/skills layout refinements
Story-refs API: UpmStore + UpmController endpoints for cross-referencing stories with commits/PRs
Sidebar SSOT: replaced stale @app_version attribute with inline Application.spec(:apm_v5, :vsn) — removes the staleness footgun

versions.label: v9.1.3 — Wave 7-9 TDD Validation + Compile Fixes
versions.summary: TDD test suites for CP-190–198 (govern_intelligence + platform tags), conversation_monitor_live compile fixes (missing helper functions), auth API endpoint tests.
features: PolicyRulesStore wildcard test suite (CP-191): 8 tests covering exact match, wildcard fallback, precedence, removal
Auth controller test suite (CP-191): 21 tests covering 8 apm-auth endpoints + decision field
Platform TDD suite (CP-198): 34 tests for Extend, Platform, AI Platform module verification
ConversationMonitorLive: add missing page_window/2, apply_filter/2, refresh_conversations/2 helpers
stream_configure dom_id for map-based conversation items (CCEM-567)

versions.label: v9.1.2 — Claude Code Harness Plugin + Hook Repair
versions.summary: Claude Code Harness Plugin (CP-199–202) with HarnessLive /plugins/harness, HarnessMonitor GenServer, HookTelemetryBuffer ETS ring buffer, and 5 API endpoints. Hook filesystem repair action (CP-203–205). audit_hook_performance action with culprit detection. SessionManagerLive assign fix. Skills coalesced to v9.1.2.
features: HarnessPlugin: :ccem scope, 3-tab LiveView at /plugins/harness (health/hooks/session)
HarnessMonitor GenServer: 15s session.json poll, PubSub harness:state
HookTelemetryBuffer: ETS ring buffer (500 cap), subscribes apm:hooks
HarnessController: /api/v2/harness/* — 5 endpoints with 503 on dead GenServer
repair_hooks action: idempotent scan, root-owned path detection, APM notification
audit_hook_performance action: culprit detection (npx cold-start, blocking curl, etc.)
SessionManagerLive: sidebar_collapsed + inspector_open assign fix, null-byte corruption repair
DocsLive: version selector with historical backfill v8.8.0–v9.1.2
Skills coalesced to v9.1.2 across ccem, apm, coalesce skill files

versions.label: v9.1.1 — Hooks Max-Payload + Coalesce + Testmaxxing Formation v2
versions.summary: Hook payloads upgraded to max-payload schema (session_id, project, working_dir, git_branch, agent identity chain). Coalesce v9.1.1 skill sync across 15 skills. Testmaxxing Formation v2 with typed edges, pub/sub channel edges, DOT graph, notification channel filter.
features: Max-payload hooks: session_id + project + working_dir + git_branch in all 9 hooks
Agent identity resolution chain: CLAUDE_AGENT_ID → PARENT_TOOL_USE_ID → CLAUDE_SESSION_ID
Memory write detection + skill invocation tracking in pre/post tool hooks
Pattern heartbeat every 10 tool calls, notification audit trail, session end summary
Coalesce: 15 skills synced — ccem-apm, apm-api-reference, apm-auth, apm-telemetry, formation, orchestrator, upm, ralph, ship, coalesce, doctor, elixir-expert, conversation-mgmt, live-all, showcase
Testmaxxing Formation v2: edge_type field, pub/sub channel edges, DOT endpoint, notification channel filter, legend

versions.label: v9.0.0 -- Ecosystem Refactoring: Architecture, Integrations, Synergize
versions.summary: Diligent Architecture type, 4 new integrations (ClaudeMem/ClaudeFlow/ClaudeExpertise/UAT), Synergize cross-copilot action, SettingsLive, Railway-style graphs, RoutingGraph fix, memory management caps.
features: Diligent Architecture (Fleet->Formation->Squadron->Swarm->Agent) with ArchitectureLive and Railway-style D3 graph
4 new integrations: ClaudeMem, ClaudeFlow, ClaudeExpertise, UAT
Synergize action for 9 copilots (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Continue, Cline, Codex, Roo Code, JetBrains, Replit, Antigravity)
SettingsLive 6-tab centralized settings at /settings
RoutingGraph JS hook (fixed blank auth routing page)
Showcase dual-tab (Engine + Standalone)
ProcessMemoryMonitor + ErrorDaemon for stability
NotificationSettings with per-category preferences
Memory management caps on 4 GenServers
Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml
Library markdown rendering via Earmark
Nav hierarchy with expandable Library + dynamic plugin children

versions.label: v8.11.0 -- Authorization UX Redesign + Plugin Expansion + Library Dashboard
versions.summary: Inline graduated authorization actions, 3-scope plugin system with CC bridge, plugin repository management, 7-tab library resource catalog, session manager filters, /529 rate limit skill.
features: Authorization panel redesign: inline notification panel with graduated actions (approve once, allow 5/15/30/60min, always allow, deny, always deny)
Plugin system expansion: 3 scopes (APM/CCEM/Claude Code), ClaudeCodePluginBridge, PluginRepositoryStore
Plugin repository REST API: 7 new endpoints for CC plugins and repository CRUD
Library dashboard: 7-tab resource catalog (agents/skills/MCP/tools/commands/patterns/learnings) with LibraryStore GenServer
Session manager filters: search, group by (project/init context/worktree), active-only toggle, per-session hide/show
Skills Fix Wizard: templates/examples repair, CCEM scope badge
/529 rate limit skill: exponential backoff, model downgrade cascade, hook integration
CCEMHelper: osascript notification fallback, permission guide, /api/status projects array

versions.label: v8.10.0 -- Auto-Approval + Command Context + Dashboard Widgets
versions.summary: AutoApprovalStore GenServer, CommandContextExtractor, WidgetRegistry, LayoutStore, AgentIdentity alignment, LVM integration foundation.
features: AutoApprovalStore: hierarchical scope matching (agent > formation > session > project) with AND logic, TTL expiry, ETS-backed
AutoApproval REST API: 6 endpoints at /api/v2/auth/auto-approval-policies (CRUD + test-match)
CommandContextExtractor: 40+ patterns for bash/SQL/file/network ops, returns action_type/action_detail/approval_reasoning
PendingDecisions enrichment: all escalations include command context (action_type, action_detail, risk_rationale)
AuthorizationGate auto-approval pipeline: checks AutoApprovalStore before escalating to human
WidgetRegistry: 8 core dashboard widgets, plugin-extensible, ETS-backed with schema validation
LayoutStore: 6 presets + 12 scenario layouts, 12-column CSS grid, per-session user layouts
AgentIdentity: 67-agent manifest with referential integrity validation
AlignmentLive: /alignment dashboard with D3.js dependency graph

versions.summary: Plugin/Integration symbiosis, agent identity taxonomy, formation TB layout, PlanePmAlign GenServer, JSONL session scanning, SimpleAgentsPlugin v2.0.
features: Agent identity taxonomy: agent_name, agent_type, agent_definition stored in AgentRegistry with normalize_agent_type/1
PluginBehaviour optional callbacks: nav_items/0, settings_path/0, plugin_live_module/0, plugin_integrations/0
IntegrationBehaviour symbiosis: required_plugin/0, target_native_feature/0 cross-reference wiring
Formation graph TB (top-bottom) 4th layout mode + namespace bounding rectangle hulls
Dashboard dep graph project-level grouping + inactive project collapse toggle
Notification grouped view by category with collapse/expand; buffer cap 2000
SessionManager JSONL scan: load_jsonl_sessions/0 reads ~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl
PlanePmAlign GenServer: polls Plane API every 5min, broadcasts plane:sync PubSub
RalphPluginLive at /plugins/ralph (PRD/Formation/History tabs)
AgUiPluginLive at /plugins/ag_ui (Events/Agents/Config tabs)

PendingDecisions TTL: 120s → 20s; sweep interval: 15s → 3s
DecisionGate default timeout: 120s → 20s
AuthorizationLive: CountdownTimer JS hook, real-time PubSub approval banners
ccem-relay Phoenix project: deployed to Azure Container Apps

Multi-project tunnel routing: /p/{project}/... path prefix stripping

versions.label: v8.0.0 — Plugin/Integration Engine
versions.summary: Full modular plugin architecture with PluginBehaviour and IntegrationBehaviour contracts. 32-agent formation deployment for migration.
features: PluginBehaviour: plugin_name/0, plugin_description/0, plugin_version/0, list_endpoints/0, handle_action/3
IntegrationBehaviour: integration_name/0, integration_description/0, handle_integration/2
PluginRegistry GenServer + ETS :plugin_registry with auto-registration on init
API router restructured with labeled scope blocks: core, auth, formation, upm, showcase, usage
GET /api/v2/manifest: API surface manifest with core vs extension classification

versions.label: v7.3.0 — Plugin Engine + Plane PM
versions.summary: First plugin integration: Plane PM with live Kanban board, issue inspector drawer, and pre_tool_use plugin context enrichment.
features: ApmV5.Plugins.PluginBehaviour behaviour contract
ApmV5.Plugins.PluginRegistry GenServer + ETS :plugin_registry
ApmV5.Plugins.Plane.PlanePlugin: list_issues, get_issue, list_projects, board_state, search_issues
PluginDashboardLive at /plugins: MCP Servers / Discovered / Registered tabs
Plane Kanban board with issue inspector pull-out drawer
pre_tool_use.sh plugin_context enrichment: emits {engine, plugin_name} in heartbeat context

versions.label: v7.0.0 — AgentLock Authorization System
versions.summary: Full agent authorization gating: PolicyEngine, TokenStore, SessionStore, RateLimiter, ContextTracker, MemoryGate, RedactionEngine, hooks, CCEMHelper integration.
features: Auth.PolicyEngine: stateless risk evaluation with default tool risk map (low/medium/high/critical)
Auth.TokenStore: ETS-backed atk_ tokens with SHA-256 param binding, 15-min TTL
Auth.SessionStore: dual-indexed ETS by session_id and agent_id, monotonic trust
Auth.RateLimiter: sliding window rate limiting per {user, tool} pair
Auth.ContextTracker: trust/provenance tracking with monotonic degradation
Auth.MemoryGate: 7 prohibited patterns for memory write operations
Auth.RedactionEngine: 7 regex patterns, auto/manual/none redaction modes
Auth.AgentLifecycle: state machine module (spawned → authenticating → authorized → running → completing → terminated)
AuthorizationLive: 4-tab dashboard (Overview, Audit Log, Tokens, Sessions)
RoutingLive: D3.js authorization flow graph
agentlock_pre_tool.sh: PreToolUse authorization hook
agentlock_post_tool.sh: PostToolUse execution recording hook
CCEMHelper AuthorizationModels.swift + auth integration in MenuBarView
